mapper.select: select water_id as waterId, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, user_room as userRoom, read_month as readMonth, last_reading as lastReading, current_reading as currentReading, surplus_water as surplusWater, used_amount as usedAmount, unit_price as unitPrice, total_fee as totalFee, balance, fee_status as feeStatus, due_date as dueDate, payment_time as paymentTime, payment_no as paymentNo, overdue_amount as overdueAmount, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from community_water_fee where water_id = #{waterId}

select water_id as waterId, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, user_room as userRoom, read_month as readMonth, last_reading as lastReading, current_reading as currentReading, surplus_water as surplusWater, used_amount as usedAmount, unit_price as unitPrice, total_fee as totalFee, balance, fee_status as feeStatus, due_date as dueDate, payment_time as paymentTime, payment_no as paymentNo, overdue_amount as overdueAmount, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from community_water_fee where user_id = 1 order by create_time desc

select water_id as waterId, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, user_room as userRoom, read_month as readMonth, last_reading as lastReading, current_reading as currentReading, surplus_water as surplusWater, used_amount as usedAmount, unit_price as unitPrice, total_fee as totalFee, balance, fee_status as feeStatus, due_date as dueDate, payment_time as paymentTime, payment_no as paymentNo, overdue_amount as overdueAmount, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from community_water_fee
mapper.update: update community_water_fee set user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_room = #{userRoom}, read_month = #{readMonth}, last_reading = #{lastReading}, current_reading = #{currentReading}, surplus_water = #{surplusWater}, used_amount = #{usedAmount}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, total_fee = #{totalFee}, balance = #{balance}, fee_status = #{feeStatus}, due_date = #{dueDate}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, payment_no = #{paymentNo}, overdue_amount = #{overdueAmount}, reader = #{reader}, read_time = #{readTime}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where water_id = #{waterId}
mapper.insert: insert into community_water_fee (user_id, user_name, user_room, read_month, last_reading, current_reading, surplus_water, used_amount, unit_price, total_fee, balance, fee_status, due_date, payment_time, payment_no, overdue_amount, reader, read_time, create_time, update_time, remark) values (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{userRoom}, #{readMonth}, #{lastReading}, #{currentReading}, #{surplusWater}, #{usedAmount}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalFee}, #{balance}, #{feeStatus}, #{dueDate}, #{paymentTime}, #{paymentNo}, #{overdueAmount}, #{reader}, #{readTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
